title: heliophila cornuta
intro: Heliophila cornuta, also known as the helmet flower, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Heliophila cornuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its potential medicinal benefits.
